heading: Today
text: Scattered rain showers with a chance for embedded storms in the afternoon. Highs from the mid 70s to near 80, mid to upper 80s in the southern valleys. Winds varying from south to west near 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph over the Greens.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered showers, with a chance for a few evening thunderstorms. Main impacts will be heavy rain, strong winds, and hail. Lows in the 50s to low 60s.

heading: Sunday
text: A good chance of showers, with a chance of embedded thunder. Cooler. Highs in the 60s to low 70s north, in the 70s south. Northwest wind turning north at 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
